# 1.2.0
## Added
- Added Froggy House structure. Generated one in the world.
- Added Froggy Bed for Tamed Froggy.
- Added eating food behavior for Tamed Froggy.
- Added armor slots for Tamed Froggy.
- Added Froggy Trader that spawns in the Froggy House with a new model.
- Added /locatefh command for locating Froggy House.
- Added Player Painting that renders dynamically player skin.
## Changed
- Changed texture and model for every Froggy entity.
- Improved screaming animation.
- Set global fleeing movement speed.
- Changed mod icon.
## Fixed
- Removed duplicated code for Froggy Jumpscare entity.
